actionUnits.condition: Manual activation of first laser on Room 3 controller (MonoBehaviour id 829909757, script guid 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). Serialized refs: doorAnim->1865011923 (Animator), winton->829909759 (AudioSource). Expected: internal state laser1 becomes true; no door animation yet.

Manual activation of second laser on Room 3 controller (MonoBehaviour id 829909757, script guid 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). With laser1 already true, this sets laser2 true. In Update(), condition laser1 && laser2 && !doorOpen becomes true, so it should play Animator 'DoorOpen' on doorAnim (1865011923) and play AudioSource winton (829909759), and set doorOpen true.
Deactivate first laser using Room 3 controller (MonoBehaviour id 829909757). Expected: laser1 becomes false; door remains open because doorOpen stays true and there is no closing logic.

Trigger Room 3->room3.SetLaser once to simulate first laser connection. Source has BoxCollider (PrefabInstance id 1538632858) so it is a valid trigger initiator. Target MonoBehaviour id 829909757 (script guid 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4) with serialized refs: doorAnim->1865011923, winton->829909759. Expected: laser1 = true; no door animation yet.

Trigger Room 3->room3.SetLaser a second time to simulate second laser connection. With laser1 already true, this sets laser2 = true. Update() on Room 3 should open the door (Animator plays 'DoorOpen') and play audio once.
Trigger Room 3->room3.DesactivateLaser to simulate breaking the first laser after the door is open. Expected: laser1 = false; door remains open (doorOpen stays true; no closing logic).

Invoke QuitGame.ExitGame on Room 3 to cover application quit path. Target MonoBehaviour id 829909760 (script guid e9bec2616c6206946b1a15b3faa151c2). Expected: Application.Quit() called (may terminate the app/TestRunner). Run this last.

Use Sender (PrefabInstance id 1538632858 with BoxCollider id 1375581698089229451). Its attached MonoBehaviour (script guid fe963bb06f1c63d4fa78e077220a709b -> LaserBeamSender, id 5803819061987961593) has roomData wired to Room 3's room3 MonoBehaviour (id 829909757, guid 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). Manually invoke first laser activation on Room 3 to simulate Sender connecting. Expected: room3.laser1 becomes true; no door animation yet.

Use Sender (1) (PrefabInstance id 807270095 with BoxCollider id 1375581698089229451). Its attached MonoBehaviour (script guid fe963bb06f1c63d4fa78e077220a709b -> LaserBeamSender, id 5803819061987961593) also targets Room 3's room3 (id 829909757). Invoke second laser activation to simulate the second beam connecting. Expected: room3.laser2 becomes true; in Update(), since laser1 && laser2 && !doorOpen, Animator 1865011923 on Room 3 plays 'DoorOpen' and AudioSource 829909759 plays; doorOpen becomes true.

Simulate breaking one beam after the door opened. Call Room 3->room3.DesactivateLaser (MonoBehaviour id 829909757). Expected: laser1 becomes false if it was true; door remains open because doorOpen stays true and there is no closing logic.

Cover quit path. Room 3 also has QuitGame MonoBehaviour (id 829909760, guid e9bec2616c6206946b1a15b3faa151c2). Invoke ExitGame last to avoid interrupting prior checks. Expected: Application.Quit() requested.

Mapping confirmation only: Cube_salle3 (1) (PrefabInstance id 1131040470) has MonoBehaviour id 5374773463603666079 using script guid 2723dba42bd113044ad231906b498006, which matches SnapToTrigger. It also has Rigidbody (Has_Rigidbody: true) and BoxCollider id 1659405682678754060. SnapToTrigger exposes only one public method Snap(Vector3) which has a parameter, so it cannot be invoked via the Trigger action per constraints; no UnityEvent m_Calls were provided to invoke it indirectly.

Use child with Collider/Rigidbody to invoke Room 3 controller. Target: room3 MonoBehaviour id 829909757 (script guid 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4), serialized fields doorAnim->1865011923 (Animator) and winton->829909759 (AudioSource) match scene. Expected: first SetLaser sets laser1=true only; no animation yet.

Second activation to satisfy door logic on Room 3 controller (MonoBehaviour id 829909757; script guid 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). With laser1 already true, SetLaser sets laser2=true. In Update(), laser1 && laser2 && !doorOpen triggers doorAnim.Play('DoorOpen') and winton.Play(); doorOpen becomes true.
Deactivate a laser on Room 3 controller (MonoBehaviour id 829909757). Expected: DesactivateLaser sets laser1=false. Door remains open because doorOpen stays true and there's no closing logic.
Invoke QuitGame on Room 3 (MonoBehaviour id 829909760; script guid e9bec2616c6206946b1a15b3faa151c2). Expected: Application.Quit() called (may terminate play mode).
